landing.heroTitle: <highlight>Track</highlight> Your Blood Test Results and Understand Health Trends
landing.heroDescription: Upload blood test PDFs and let ViziAI analyze your results with AI. Track health trends over time with clear visual charts and dashboards.
landing.dashboardAlt: ViziAI Dashboard - Visually track your test results
landing.neverEasier: Understanding your test results has never been easier.

features.aiAnalysisDesc: Automatically extracts and organizes test data from PDFs using artificial intelligence.
features.visualDashboardDesc: Track and compare your values over time with visual charts.
features.easyUploadDesc: Easily upload your test reports in PDF format with drag and drop.
features.securePrivateDesc: Your data is stored on secure infrastructure, accessible only by you.

howItWorksSteps.step1Desc: Drag and drop your blood test report. We support lab PDFs in Turkish, English, German, French, and Spanish.
howItWorksSteps.step2Desc: Our AI reads your PDF and extracts every metric, value, and reference range — even from scanned documents.
howItWorksSteps.step3Desc: See all your results on a unified dashboard with trend charts. Spot changes at a glance across reports from any country.

socialProof.description: Track blood tests from Turkish, English, German, French, and Spanish labs — all in one dashboard.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: ViziAI takes your privacy seriously. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights. We keep it simple and transparent — no legalese.

dataCollection.title: What We Collect
dataCollection.description: When you use ViziAI, we collect:

items.account: Your Google account email and name (for authentication)
items.bloodTests: Blood test PDF files you upload (temporarily stored during processing)
items.labValues: Extracted lab values, metric names, and reference ranges
items.tracking: Health tracking data you manually enter (weight, blood pressure)
items.usage: Basic usage analytics (page visits, feature usage) via Google Analytics

dataStorage.title: How We Store Your Data
dataStorage.description: Your data is stored securely in a Neon Postgres database. PDF files are temporarily stored in Vercel Blob during processing and deleted after extraction is complete. All connections use HTTPS encryption.

aiProcessing.title: AI Processing
aiProcessing.description: When you upload a blood test PDF, we use OpenAI's API to extract lab values from the document. The PDF content is sent to OpenAI for processing and is subject to OpenAI's data usage policies. We do not use your health data to train AI models.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.description: We use essential cookies for authentication (keeping you logged in) and a locale preference cookie (remembering your language choice). Google Analytics uses cookies for anonymous usage statistics. We do not use advertising or tracking cookies.

items.access: Access all data we store about you
items.export: Export your data in a standard format
items.delete: Request deletion of your account and all associated data
items.withdraw: Withdraw consent and stop using the service at any time

dataDeletion.title: Data Deletion
dataDeletion.description: You can delete individual reports, profiles, or your entire account from the Settings page. When you delete data, it is permanently removed from our database. There is no recovery.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: For privacy-related questions or data requests, contact us at:

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about ViziAI

whatIsViziAI.a: ViziAI is a health tracking platform that lets you upload blood test results as PDFs and analyze them with AI. Track your values over time with visual charts and manage family members' results in separate profiles.

noMedicalAdvice.q: Does ViziAI interpret my results or diagnose conditions?
noMedicalAdvice.a: No. ViziAI only organizes your lab results — it collects reports from different languages and laboratories in one place, matches metric names, and shows your trends over time. It does not provide any medical interpretation, diagnosis, or treatment advice. Always discuss your results with your doctor.

howToUpload.q: How do I upload my test results?
howToUpload.a: Click "Upload Report" from the dashboard and drag and drop your PDF file. Our AI reads the PDF and automatically extracts metric names, values, and reference ranges. Review and confirm the results, and they'll be saved to your profile.

enabizImport.a: Yes! Install our Chrome extension, create an API key and paste it into the extension. Then go to enabiz.gov.tr's Tahlillerim page and click "Send to ViziAI" to transfer your results with one click.

dataSecure.a: Yes. Your data is stored in a secure Neon Postgres database and all connections use HTTPS encryption. Uploaded PDFs are deleted after processing. Only you and people you explicitly grant access to can view your data.

familyTracking.q: How do I track family members' data?
familyTracking.a: You can create a separate profile for each family member. Share profiles with others and set access levels as owner, editor, or viewer.

isFree.a: ViziAI is currently completely free. We'll add a paid plan with advanced features in the future, but there will always be a free tier.

languages.a: ViziAI's interface supports Turkish, English, Spanish, German, and French. Our AI can also process lab PDFs in all five languages.

testsAbroad.q: Can I upload tests done abroad?
testsAbroad.a: Yes! You can upload lab reports from any country in supported languages (Turkish, English, Spanish, German, French). All results are unified in a single dashboard.

afterUpload.q: What happens after I upload a PDF?
afterUpload.a: Our AI reads your PDF and extracts every metric name, value, and reference range. You can review, edit, and confirm the results in a review step. Once confirmed, the data is saved to your profile and appears on your dashboard.

whoCanSee.a: Only you and people you explicitly grant access to through profile sharing settings. You can set access levels for each person as owner, editor, or viewer.

deleteData.a: Yes. You can delete individual reports, profiles, or your entire account from the Settings page. Deleted data is permanently removed from the database and cannot be recovered.

colorMeaning.a: Green indicates the value is within the reference range. Amber signals borderline values. Terracotta (orange-brown) means the value is outside the reference range. We use terracotta instead of bright red to avoid unnecessary alarm.

referenceRanges.q: Where do reference ranges come from?
referenceRanges.a: Reference ranges are extracted directly from the PDF you upload — we use your lab's actual ranges. Different labs may use different ranges, and that's normal.

mobileApp.a: ViziAI is currently a web application, but it's designed to work great on mobile devices. Visit viziai.app from your phone's browser for the full experience.

chromeExtension.q: How does the Chrome extension work?
chromeExtension.a: Our Chrome extension integrates with the e-Nabız website. After installing it and pasting your API key, a "Send to ViziAI" button appears on the Tahlillerim page in e-Nabız. Click it to transfer your results directly without needing to upload a PDF.
